title: elaphoglossum loreae
intro: Elaphoglossum loreae, also known as Loreae's Elaphoglossum, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its chemical composition. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum loreae include its potential to treat various conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and bronchodilator properties. Elaphoglossum loreae can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in various herbal preparations.
